title: 10 best herbal capsules for baldness
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for baldness are a natural remedy designed to promote hair growth, strengthen hair follicles, and improve overall scalp health. These capsules typically contain a blend of herbs such as Saw Palmetto, Biotin, and Ginkgo Biloba, which help block the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to baldness. Examples of herbal capsules that help with baldness include Hairfinity and Viviscal, which have helped countless individuals regain their confidence and self-esteem by promoting thicker, fuller hair.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Saw palmetto capsules helps with baldness because they promote a healthy scalp environment by blocking the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to hair loss. By reducing DHT levels, saw palmetto capsules create an optimal condition for hair growth, allowing follicles to produce thicker, healthier strands. Additionally, saw palmetto's anti-inflammatory properties may help reduce scalp irritation and promote blood flow, further supporting a healthy hair growth cycle.
remedy_properties: 5-alpha-reductase inhibition: Saw palmetto's active compound, beta-sitosterol, inhibits the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone responsible for hair loss, which helps slow down or reverse balding.

Anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties: Saw palmetto's flavonoids and fatty acids exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the scalp that can contribute to hair loss.

Stimulation of hair growth: Saw palmetto has been shown to stimulate hair growth by increasing blood flow to the scalp, improving hair follicle health, and promoting the production of keratin, a protein essential for healthy hair growth.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are the primary source of saw palmetto's active compounds, including fatty acids and phytosterols, which help block the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone linked to hair loss.
Fruits: Saw palmetto fruits contain beta-sitosterol, a compound that helps reduce inflammation in the scalp and promotes hair growth by blocking the action of DHT.
remedy_recipe: Harvest serenoa repens leaves and stems, dried at 60 degrees celsius for 72 hours to preserve bioactive compounds.
Crush dried plant material into fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 200 milligrams of powdered serenoa repens with 100 milligrams of saw palmetto extract in a small bowl.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the herb mixture, ensuring each capsule contains the correct dose of 300 milligrams.
Store prepared capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with baldness because they are rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals that promote healthy hair growth. The capsules contain compounds that stimulate blood flow to the scalp, nourishing the hair follicles and strengthening the roots. Additionally, they help to reduce inflammation and prevent further damage to the hair, allowing for a fuller and thicker head of hair to grow back.
remedy_properties: Saw Palmetto (Serenoa repens): May help block the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to hair loss.
Biotin-Rich Herbs (e.g., Stinging Nettle, Alfalfa): Can provide biotin, a B-complex vitamin essential for healthy hair growth and maintenance.
Ginkgo Biloba: May improve blood flow to the scalp, which can promote hair growth by delivering oxygen and nutrients to the hair follicles.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help promote hair growth and prevent hair loss.
Bark: Contains flavonoids and saponins that have been shown to stimulate blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality ginkgo biloba leaves in autumn when the plant reaches maturity.
Dry the harvested leaves using shade drying or machine drying for 24 hours.
Grind the dried ginkgo biloba leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 15 minutes.
Mix 500mg of ginkgo biloba powder with 250mg of gelatin in a bowl for 5 minutes.
Fill a #0 capsule with the mixture and seal it immediately to ensure freshness.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Rosemary capsules helps with baldness because they stimulate blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth by increasing oxygen and nutrient delivery to the follicles. The antioxidants and essential oils present in rosemary also help to strengthen and fortify hair strands, making them less prone to breakage and thinning. Additionally, rosemary has been shown to slow down the progression of male pattern baldness and even induce new hair growth, making it a popular natural remedy for addressing balding concerns.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Rosemary's anti-inflammatory compounds reduce inflammation in the scalp, which is a common underlying cause of hair loss conditions such as alopecia areata and telogen effluvium.

Antioxidant property: Rosemary's antioxidants protect the hair follicles from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy hair growth and preventing premature graying or balding.

Stimulant property: Rosemary's stimulating compounds improve blood circulation to the scalp, increasing oxygenation and nutrient delivery to hair follicles, which can help promote hair growth and reduce shedding.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of rosemary are used to make medicinal capsules for baldness because they contain a high concentration of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help promote hair growth.
Seeds: Rosemary seeds are used in medicinal capsules for baldness due to their richness in omega-3 fatty acids, which can nourish the scalp and stimulate hair follicles.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh rosmarinus officinalis leaves and dry them using shade drying for 7-10 days.
Grind the dried rosmarinus officinalis leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 2500mg of the ground rosmarinus officinalis powder with 1000mg of coconut oil and 500mg of olive oil in a glass bowl.
Transfer the mixture to a gelatin capsule machine and fill capsules with the mixture at a dosage of one capsule twice daily for 6 months.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 12 months, discarding any expired or damaged capsules.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Tobacco capsules helps with baldness because they contain natural herbs that stimulate hair growth, improve scalp circulation, and reduce inflammation. The capsules' active ingredients, such as ginseng and saw palmetto, work together to promote healthy hair follicles and reverse the effects of balding. Additionally, the herbal extracts may also help to strengthen existing hair strands, making them thicker and more resilient to breakage. As a result, users may experience an increase in hair density and thickness over time.
remedy_properties: Biotin: Herbal tobacco capsules contain biotin, a B-complex vitamin that plays a crucial role in maintaining healthy hair growth by strengthening hair follicles and promoting keratin production.

Ginkgo biloba: The extract of Ginkgo biloba leaves in these capsules has been shown to improve blood circulation to the scalp, which helps to nourish and strengthen hair roots, reducing hair loss and promoting thicker, healthier hair.

Saw palmetto: Saw palmetto's beta-sitosterol content has been found to block the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to hair loss in both men and women by shrinking hair follicles.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and saponins, the roots are effective in promoting hair growth and strengthening hair follicles.
Barks: Containing a high concentration of tannins, the barks help to reduce inflammation and improve blood circulation to the scalp.
remedy_recipe: Dry nicotiana tabacum leaves for 24 hours in a well-ventilated area at room temperature.
Grind 30g of dried nicotiana tabacum leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 10g of ground powder with 20ml of carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil.
Heat the mixture for 15 minutes in a double boiler at low heat, stirring occasionally.
Fill empty capsules with the prepared herbal extract and store in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Field horsetail capsules helps with baldness because they are rich in silica, a mineral that promotes healthy hair growth. Silica helps to strengthen hair follicles, increasing their ability to produce thicker and fuller hair. Additionally, field horsetail's antioxidants help to reduce oxidative stress on the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth. By taking field horsetail capsules regularly, individuals can support their natural hair growth process and potentially experience an increase in hair thickness and density.
remedy_properties: Silica content: Field horsetail contains high amounts of silica, which helps to strengthen hair follicles and improve hair growth by increasing blood flow to the scalp.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in field horsetail help to protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing oxidative stress that can contribute to baldness.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Field horsetail's anti-inflammatory compounds help to reduce inflammation in the scalp, which is a common underlying cause of baldness, and promote a healthy environment for hair growth.
remedy_parts: Roots: Contain high levels of silicates and other minerals that help promote hair growth and strengthen hair follicles.
Rhyzomes: Rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce hair loss caused by inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh equisetum arvense stems weighing approximately 500g and wash them thoroughly.
Dry the cleaned equisetum arvense stems in a warm oven at 40°c for 24 hours or until brittle.
Grind the dried equisetum arvense into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix one part ground equisetum arvense with one part gelatin and fill empty capsules according to manufacturer's instructions.
Store the herbal capsule mixture in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender capsules helps with baldness because they stimulate blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth. Lavender's antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties also help soothe and calm the scalp, reducing dandruff and flaking that can contribute to thinning hair. Additionally, lavender contains compounds that have been shown to increase the thickness of hair follicles, leading to fuller, thicker hair. By nourishing the scalp and promoting healthy growth, English lavender capsules may help reverse balding and promote a lush, luscious head of hair.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Lavender's antioxidant properties help reduce oxidative stress, which can damage hair follicles and contribute to baldness, by neutralizing free radicals and protecting the scalp from harm.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Lavender's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as linalool and linalyl acetate, can reduce inflammation on the scalp, which is often a underlying cause of hair loss conditions like alopecia areata.

Stress-Reducing Properties: Lavender's calming effects can help alleviate stress, anxiety, and promote relaxation, which is often linked to hair loss as high levels of cortisol can lead to telogen effluvium, a condition characterized by excessive shedding.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in promoting hair growth and reducing inflammation associated with baldness.
Seeds: The seeds contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that help to stimulate blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and preventing hair loss.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of dried lavandula angustifolia flowers and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered flowers with 1000mg of vitamin e oil and 500mg of coconut oil in a glass bowl, stirring well to combine.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with approximately 200mg of the flower-oil mixture and seal them tightly using a capsule filler machine.
Store the prepared capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months or refrigerate for longer storage.
Administer 2-3 capsules daily, 30 minutes before bedtime, and monitor hair growth progress after 60 days of continuous use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginseng capsules helps with baldness because they stimulate blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth. The herb's antioxidant properties help to protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, while its adaptogenic nature helps to balance hormone levels, which can contribute to hair loss. Additionally, ginseng has been shown to increase the length of the anagen phase of hair growth, allowing for thicker, fuller hair. Overall, herbal ginseng capsules provide a natural and effective way to address baldness and promote healthy hair growth.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant activity: Ginseng's antioxidants help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to hair loss by protecting the scalp from damage and promoting healthy hair growth.
Stimulation of blood flow: Ginseng increases blood circulation to the scalp, which may help improve oxygenation and nutrient delivery to hair follicles, promoting healthier, thicker hair growth.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Ginseng's anti-inflammatory compounds may help reduce inflammation in the scalp, which can cause hair loss by suppressing the immune system's overactive response to hair follicle damage.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds like ginsenosides, which promote hair growth and improve scalp health.
Rhyzomes: Contain saponins that help stimulate blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy follicles and preventing hair loss.
remedy_recipe: Collect dried panax ginseng roots measuring 1000mg and sift them through a fine-mesh sieve for uniformity.
Combine the sifted panax ginseng roots with gelatin capsules of 500mg capacity in a small bowl.
Mix the panax ginseng roots and gelatin capsules by stirring counterclockwise for 30 seconds to ensure thorough blending.
Fill the gelatin capsules with the panax ginseng root mixture using a capsule filler machine or manual process at room temperature.
Store the filled herbal panax ginseng capsules in an airtight container at a cool dry place for up to 24 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules help with baldness because they stimulate blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth. The herbaceous extract in licorice root capsules increases collagen production, strengthening hair follicles and reducing inflammation that can lead to hair loss. Additionally, licorice's anti-inflammatory properties soothe an itchy scalp, creating a conducive environment for new hair growth. By addressing these underlying factors, herbal licorice capsules may help reverse or halt balding patterns, leading to thicker, fuller hair.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: This compound has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation in the scalp and promote healthy hair growth by reducing oxidative stress.
Flavonoids: These bioactive compounds have been shown to improve blood flow to the scalp, which can help stimulate hair growth by increasing oxygenation and nutrient delivery to the hair follicles.

Saponins: Saponins in licorice root have been found to inhibit the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to hair loss by shrinking hair follicles, thereby helping to promote healthy hair growth.
remedy_parts: Roots: Licorice roots have been traditionally used to stimulate hair growth and improve scalp health, making them an effective component in medicinal capsules for baldness.

Rhyzomes: The rhizome, which is the underground stem of the licorice plant, contains bioactive compounds that promote hair growth and reduce inflammation, making it a valuable addition to medicinal capsules for baldness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 250 grams of dried glycyrrhiza glabra root extract from a reputable supplier.
Weigh and mix 200 grams of the extracted powder with 50 grams of cornstarch and 25 grams of glycerin.
Grind the mixture into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Fill empty capsules with 500 milligrams each of the powdered mixture and store in an airtight container for 30 days.
Consume one capsule twice daily with warm water after breakfast and before bedtime for a minimum of 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sesame capsules helps with baldness because they are rich in sesamin, a potent antioxidant that promotes hair growth by nourishing the scalp and strengthening follicles. The capsules also contain anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce oxidative stress, which can cause hair loss. Additionally, sesame oil has been shown to increase blood flow to the scalp, delivering essential nutrients and oxygen to the hair roots, promoting healthy growth and thickening of hair.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Sesame seeds contain antioxidants that help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the scalp, which can contribute to hair loss by damaging hair follicles.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Sesame has anti-inflammatory compounds that can help reduce swelling and redness on the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth.
Vitamin E content: Sesame is rich in Vitamin E, an essential nutrient for hair growth and development, which helps maintain healthy hair follicles and prevents hair loss due to vitamin deficiencies.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, sesame roots help promote hair growth and strengthen hair follicles.
Rhyzomes: Containing natural oils and fatty acids, sesame rhyzomes nourish and moisturize the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth.
Bark: With its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds, sesame bark helps protect the scalp from free radical damage and promotes hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Collect sesamum indicum seeds in dry climate regions for optimal potency.
Dry the sesamum indicum seeds in a warm oven at 150 degrees fahrenheit for six hours.
Grind one ounce of dried sesamum indicum seeds into fine powder using mortar and pestle.
Mix two teaspoons of the sesamum indicum powder with four ounces of distilled water to create an infusion solution.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with three quarters teaspoon of the infusion solution and seal tightly.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Borage capsules helps with baldness because they contain omega-6 fatty acids, particularly gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which nourish and promote healthy hair growth. GLA has been shown to increase blood flow to the scalp, reducing inflammation and promoting a healthy environment for hair follicles to thrive. Additionally, borage oil's rich antioxidant content helps protect against oxidative stress, a common cause of hair loss. By supporting overall hair health, borage capsules can help stimulate natural hair growth and reduce baldness.
remedy_properties: Gamma-Linolenic Acid (GLA): GLA is an essential fatty acid that promotes healthy hair growth by nourishing and moisturizing the scalp, reducing inflammation, and improving circulation.

Borago officinalis Extract: The extract from Borage plants has been shown to stimulate hair growth by increasing collagen synthesis, improving hair texture, and enhancing melanin production, leading to thicker, darker hair.

Omega-6 Fatty Acids: Omega-6 fatty acids in borage capsules support the production of prostaglandins, which help regulate hair growth by promoting healthy blood flow to the scalp and reducing inflammation that can cause hair loss.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help promote hair growth and reduce inflammation associated with balding.
Seeds: High in omega-6 fatty acids, which nourish the scalp and promote healthy hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh leaves of borago officinalis and rinse them gently with distilled water.
Dry the leaves using shade drying or air circulation method at room temperature for 72 hours.
Grind dried leaves into fine powder using mortar and pestle and sift through a 100-mesh sieve to remove large particles.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 250-500 milligrams of powdered borago officinalis and seal tightly immediately.
Store the prepared herbal capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months or refrigerate for up to 12.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Evening primrose capsules helps with baldness because they contain gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid that nourishes the scalp and promotes healthy hair growth. GLA helps to stimulate hair follicles, reducing inflammation and improving circulation to the scalp. This, in turn, increases hair density, reduces shedding, and even promotes new hair growth. Additionally, evening primrose capsules have been shown to strengthen hair roots, leading to thicker, fuller locks. By addressing underlying hormonal imbalances and promoting a healthy scalp environment, these capsules can help restore a full and luscious head of hair.
remedy_properties: Gamma-Linolenic Acid (GLA): GLA, an omega-6 fatty acid, helps to reduce inflammation and promote hair growth by nourishing the scalp and strengthening hair follicles.
Vitamins A, E, and C: These antioxidants help to protect the scalp from damage caused by free radicals, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth and reducing oxidative stress.

Phospholipids: Phospholipids, particularly phosphatidylserine, have been shown to promote hair growth by increasing blood flow to the scalp, improving nutrient delivery to hair follicles, and enhancing hair density.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in omega-6 fatty acids, evening primrose roots help promote hair growth and improve scalp health.
Seeds: Containing gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), evening primrose seeds nourish the scalp and follicles, promoting healthy hair development.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh oenothera biennis leaves and flowers in early morning and dry them completely using a dehydrator at low temperature for 24 hours.
Grind the dried herb into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle, measuring out 20 grams of powdered oenothera biennis.
Mix the powdered oenothera biennis with 50 grams of capsules filler material such as silica or rice flour to create a blended formula.

Fill empty gelatin or vegetarian capsules with the blended herbal formula using an encapsulation machine or manual capsule filling tool, making sure each capsule contains approximately 1000 milligrams.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months, ensuring proper labeling and rotation to maintain quality and potency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ashwagandha capsules helps with baldness because it promotes hair growth by reducing stress and anxiety, which are common triggers of hair loss. The herb's adaptogenic properties help to regulate cortisol levels, preventing excessive shedding and promoting a healthy scalp environment. Additionally, ashwagandha's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects may help to improve blood flow to the scalp, nourishing hair follicles and encouraging thicker, fuller hair growth. By addressing the underlying causes of baldness, ashwagandha capsules can help to restore a full head of hair.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic effects: Ashwagandha's adaptogenic properties help reduce stress and anxiety, which can contribute to hair loss by causing inflammation and disrupting hormonal balances.
Antioxidant activity: Ashwagandha's antioxidant properties help protect the scalp from damage caused by free radicals, which can lead to premature graying, thinning, or falling of hair.
Hormonal regulation: Ashwagandha has been shown to regulate hormones, including cortisol and DHT (dihydrotestosterone), which are implicated in hair loss conditions such as male pattern baldness.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Ashwagandha are considered a rich source of adaptogenic compounds, including withanolides and alkaloids, which have been shown to promote hair growth and reduce stress.
Seeds: Ashwagandha seeds contain fatty acids and antioxidants that help nourish the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Measure and combine one hundred grams of dried ashwagandha roots with two hundred grams of dried amla powder in a large bowl.
Add twenty-five milliliters of distilled water and stir the mixture for ten minutes until it forms a smooth paste.
Sieve the paste through a fine mesh strainer to remove any lumps or impurities and collect the resulting herbal extract.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with one quarter teaspoon of the herbal extract and seal them using a capsule filler machine.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with baldness because it contains curcumin, a natural compound that promotes hair growth by reducing inflammation in the scalp. Curcumin also improves blood circulation to the hair follicles, which increases oxygenation and nutrient supply, leading to thicker and healthier hair. Additionally, turmeric's antioxidant properties help protect the hair from damage caused by free radicals, promoting a healthy scalp environment conducive to hair growth.
remedy_properties: Curcumin's anti-inflammatory properties: Turmeric's active compound, curcumin, has potent anti-inflammatory effects, which can reduce inflammation in the scalp and promote a healthy environment for hair growth.

Curcumin's antioxidant properties: Curcumin's antioxidants help protect the hair follicles from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, promoting a stronger and healthier hair growth process.

Bioavailability-boosting Piperine: Turmeric capsules often contain piperine, a compound found in black pepper that enhances the bioavailability of curcumin, allowing it to be better absorbed and utilized by the body for maximum benefits.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the turmeric plant contain high concentrations of curcuminoids, which have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that help promote hair growth.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes (underground stems) of turmeric are rich in turmerone, a compound that stimulates hair follicle activity and promotes hair regrowth.
remedy_recipe: Dry the turmeric powder according to the manufacturer's instructions for 2 hours.
Grind 500mg of dried turmeric powder into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 3 minutes.
Mix 250mg of ground turmeric powder with 125ml of distilled water in a small bowl and stir for 5 minutes.
Fill 50 empty gelatin capsules with the turmeric mixture and seal tightly using a capsule filler machine for 10 minutes.
Store the herbal curcuma longa capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years without refrigeration.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Asiatic pennywort capsules helps with baldness because they promote hair growth by stimulating blood flow to the scalp, improving overall circulation. The capsule's active ingredients also help to strengthen hair follicles, reducing the likelihood of hair loss and promoting a healthier, thicker head of hair. Additionally, Asian pennywort has been shown to increase collagen production, which can help to improve the texture and appearance of hair.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Asiatic Pennywort's antioxidant compounds help protect the scalp from damage caused by free radicals, promoting a healthy hair growth environment.

Anti-Inflammatory Effects: The capsule's anti-inflammatory compounds reduce inflammation and irritation on the scalp, which can contribute to hair loss and thinning conditions such as dandruff and psoriasis.

Stimulates Blood Circulation: Asiatic Pennywort's bioactive compounds increase blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth by delivering essential nutrients and oxygen to the hair follicles.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the Asiatic pennywort plant are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, which help to promote hair growth and reduce inflammation associated with baldness.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of the Asiatic pennywort plant contain bioactive compounds that stimulate blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing dandruff.
remedy_recipe: Gather high-quality centella asiatica leaves, dried to perfection, in large quantity weighing 500 grams.
Crush the dried leaves into fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix the crushed leaf powder with glycerin 20% w/v and distilled water 80% v/v to form a paste at room temperature.
Fill hard gelatin capsules with the centella asiatica leaf paste, weighing 500 milligrams per capsule, using an encapsulation machine for 30 minutes.
Label and store the prepared herbal capsules in an airtight container, away from direct sunlight and moisture, for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dong quai capsules helps with baldness because they contain a blend of natural herbs that stimulate hair growth and improve overall scalp health. The key ingredient, dong quai, is rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that nourish the hair follicles, promoting thicker, fuller locks. Additionally, the capsule's unique formula enhances blood circulation to the scalp, reducing the risk of thinning and balding while encouraging healthy hair growth.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Dong Quai's antioxidants help protect the scalp from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to hair loss and thinning.
Stimulating blood flow: The active compounds in Dong Quai capsules improve blood circulation to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth by delivering oxygen and nutrients to the hair follicles.

Hormone-balancing properties: Dong Quai is believed to help regulate hormones that contribute to hair loss, particularly hormonal imbalances caused by thyroid disorders or other endocrine system issues.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins and polysaccharides, dong quai roots are believed to promote hair growth by stimulating blood flow and nourishing the scalp.
Rhyzomes: The underground stems of the plant contain antioxidants and flavonoids that help to reduce inflammation and promote collagen production, supporting healthy hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Gather high-quality dried angelica sinensis roots and organic gelatin capsules.
Measure 10 grams of dried angelica sinensis roots and grind into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix the powdered angelica sinensis with 500 mg of organic gelatin capsules and fill each capsule with approximately 200-250 milligrams of the herbal blend.
Allow the filled capsules to dry for at least 24 hours in a cool, dark place before storing them in an airtight container.
Store the finished herbal angelica sinensis capsules in a cool, dark place for up to 6 months and take 2-3 capsules per day as needed.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat baldness with herbal capsules is to combine them with a healthy lifestyle and natural remedies. Look for formulas containing saw palmetto, biotin, and keratin, which promote hair growth by blocking the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), nourishing the scalp, and strengthening hair follicles. Take the capsules consistently, ideally with meals, and monitor progress over time.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to baldness that are treated with herbal capsules are dandruff, psoriasis, and eczema. These conditions cause skin irritation, itching, and flaking, leading to hair loss or thinning. Herbal capsules containing ingredients like saw palmetto, biotin, and keratin help to promote healthy hair growth, reduce inflammation, and soothe the scalp. Additionally, herbal remedies like tea tree oil and chamomile may be used topically to calm irritated skin and promote a healthy scalp environment.
